calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for UD Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

MICHAEL HEATH, Esq. appeared for plaintiff SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN, who was present THRU REPRESENTATIVE JINA PATEL at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant TERRY WEST.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN and against the Defaulted Defendant TERRY WEST as follows:

RESTITUTION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 1139 MARKET STREET #246, SF, CA 94103; RENTAL AGREEMENT CANCELED

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: sravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Jacob Barlew, Esq. for and with the plaintiff Shree Jalaram Lodging LP dba Budget Inn.
No appearance by the Defendant Gary Paige.
Settlement conference is taken off calendar, Trial Date confirmed.
